title: Papa Johns Menu with Prices (2026): Complete Guide to Every Item
excerpt: Looking for the complete Papa John's menu? Discover all classic pizzas, Papadias, sides, exact 2026 prices, and insider ordering hacks.
content:
Planning your next Papa Johns order but not sure what's on the menu or how much it costs? You've come to the right place. This complete papa johns menu guide covers every single item available in 2026 — from their signature pizzas and crowd-pleasing wings to the newer Papadias, Papa Bites, sides, desserts, drinks, and dipping sauces — all with up-to-date prices.

Last Updated: March 2026

Whether you're ordering for yourself, feeding a family, hunting for the best Papa Johns deals, or just curious about what Papa Johns has to offer, this guide gives you everything you need in one place. We've also included calorie information, a breakdown of all current crust types, the best current deals, and tips on how to get the most value from your order.

Let's explore the full Papa Johns menu — slice by slice. 🍕

Why Papa Johns? A Quick Brand Overview

Papa Johns was founded in 1984 by John Schnatter in Jeffersonville, Indiana — starting out of a converted broom closet in his father's tavern. Fast forward to 2026, and Papa Johns is now the third-largest pizza chain in the United States, operating over 5,400 locations across more than 44 countries worldwide. You can find your nearest Papa Johns location using our store locator.

What makes Papa Johns stand apart from competitors like Domino's and Pizza Hut? Their core philosophy — 'Better Ingredients. Better Pizza.' — is more than just a slogan. Papa Johns uses fresh, never-frozen dough, 100% real mozzarella cheese, vine-ripened tomato sauce, and quality toppings with no artificial flavors or MSG in their standard recipes.

The result is a pizza that tastes noticeably fresher. And with a menu that has grown to include wings, flatbreads, bite-sized snacks, and more, Papa Johns is now a full meal destination, not just a pizza place. Make sure to check the Papa Johns Rewards program before you order to earn points on every purchase.

Papa Johns Crust Options — All 6 Types Explained

The foundation of every great Papa Johns pizza is the crust. In 2026, Papa Johns offers six distinct crust options to suit every preference and dietary need. Check our full menu & prices page for the latest crust availability at your location:

Crust Type Cal/Slice Texture Price Range Best For
Original Hand Tossed~270 calSoft & chewy$10.99–$18.99Classic pizza lovers
Thin Crust~200 calCrispy, light$10.99–$18.99Calorie-conscious eaters ✅
New York Style~320 calLarge, foldable$11.99 (XL deal)Authentic NY pizza fans
Epic Stuffed Crust~330 calCheesy edge$13.99–$22.99Cheese lovers
Garlic Epic Stuffed Crust~370 calGarlic cheesy edge$13.99–$22.99Garlic + cheese fans
Gluten-Free Crust~150 calLighter, crispier$10.99–$13.99Gluten-sensitive* only

⚠️ Note: Gluten-Free Crust is baked in shared ovens — not safe for celiac disease. Contains milk, egg, and soy. For full nutrition details see our Papa Johns nutrition guide.

Papa Johns Pizza Menu with Prices (2026)

The Papa Johns pizza menu is divided into classic pizzas you build yourself and handcrafted specialty pizzas with preset toppings. Here's the complete breakdown:

Classic Pizzas — Build Your Own

Pizza Small Medium Large XL
Cheese Pizza$10.99$12.99$14.99$16.99
Pepperoni Pizza$10.99$12.99$15.78$17.99
Sausage Pizza$10.99$12.99$14.99$16.99
Create Your Own$10.99+$12.99+$14.99+$16.99+

Handcrafted Specialty Pizzas — 2026

Specialty Pizza Price Cal/Slice What's On It
The Works Pizza$18.99~340 calPepperoni, sausage, mushrooms, onions, green peppers, black olives
The Meats Pizza$18.99~380 calPepperoni, sausage, bacon, grilled chicken
Shaq-a-Roni Pizza$18.78~390 calXL pizza, extra cheese, extra pepperoni — Shaq's signature
Philly Cheesesteak Pizza$18.99~360 calBeef, onions, green peppers, mozzarella & provolone
Fiery Buffalo Chicken Pizza$18.99~330 calBuffalo sauce, chicken, onions, bacon, mozzarella
BBQ Chicken Bacon Pizza$18.99~350 calBBQ sauce, grilled chicken, bacon, onions
Super Hawaiian Pizza$18.99~340 calHam, bacon, pineapple, banana peppers, mozzarella
Ultimate Pepperoni Pizza$18.99~360 calDouble pepperoni, extra cheese — the pepperoni lover's dream
Tuscan Six Cheese Pizza$18.99~320 calParmesan, Romano, Asiago, Fontina, Provolone & Mozzarella
Garden Fresh Pizza$18.99~280 calMushrooms, onions, green peppers, black olives, tomatoes
Spinach & Tomato Alfredo$18.99~290 calAlfredo sauce, fresh spinach, diced tomatoes, mozzarella
Zesty Italian Trio Pizza$18.99~350 calPepperoni, Italian sausage, salami, banana peppers, Italian seasoning

💡 Best Value Pick: Papa Pairings deal — mix and match any 2+ medium 1-topping pizzas + sides for just $6.99 each!

Papa Johns Papadias — Flatbread Sandwiches with a Pizza Twist

Papadias are Papa Johns' answer to the flatbread sandwich — pizza ingredients folded into a fresh-baked, foldable flatbread. Read our detailed Papadias flavor guide for the full breakdown. They're hearty, handheld, and perfect if you want a more sandwich-style meal. Each Papadia is priced at $7.99–$8.99 and contains around 780–820 calories.

Papadia Price Calories Key Ingredients
Philly Cheesesteak Papadia$7.99~800 calSteak, onions, green peppers, cheese sauce
BBQ Chicken & Bacon Papadia$7.99~820 calBBQ sauce, grilled chicken, bacon, mozzarella
Grilled Buffalo Chicken Papadia$7.99~780 calBuffalo sauce, grilled chicken, onions, mozzarella
Italian Papadia$7.99~810 calAlfredo sauce, Italian sausage, salami, banana peppers

💡 Pro Tip: Papadias come with a dipping sauce of your choice. Order the garlic dipping sauce for the ultimate flavor boost.

Papa Johns Papa Bites — Bite-Sized & Boldly Flavored

Papa Bites are one of the most exciting additions to the Papa Johns menu — small, pull-apart rolls available in both savory and sweet versions. Perfect as a snack, starter, or dessert. Each order contains 8 rolls and is priced at $6.99.

Savory Papa Bites:

  • Jalapeño Papa Bites — ~80 cal/roll | Cream cheese-filled, jalapeño on top, crispy finish
  • Chicken Parmesan Papa Bites — ~90 cal/roll | Chicken, marinara, mozzarella, Parmesan
  • Crispy Cuppy Roni Papa Bites — ~95 cal/roll | Pizza sauce, pepperoni, mozzarella (limited time 2026)

Sweet Papa Bites:

  • OREO Cookie Papa Bites — ~85 cal/roll | OREO cookie pieces, cream cheese icing drizzle — a dessert crowd favorite

🔥 New 2026: Crispy Cuppy Roni Papa Bites are a limited-time item in 2026 — order before they disappear! Check papajohns.com menu for current availability.

Papa Johns Wings Menu — Flavors, Prices & Calories

Papa Johns wings are oven-baked (not fried), making them slightly lighter than typical fast-food wings. Available in bone-in and boneless varieties, they're a great addition to any pizza order — or a satisfying standalone meal.

Wing Flavor Type Price (8 pc) Cal (4 pc) Flavor Profile
Buffalo WingsBone-in$8.49~240 calClassic spicy & tangy
Honey Chipotle WingsBone-in$8.49~260 calSweet, smoky, mild heat
Garlic Parmesan WingsBone-in$8.49~270 calRich, savory, garlicky
Unsauced Roasted WingsBone-in$8.49~220 cal ✅Plain, lowest calorie
Hot Lemon Pepper WingsBone-in$8.49~245 calCitrusy + spicy kick
Boneless Buffalo WingsBoneless$8.49~310 calClassic Buffalo, no bones
Boneless Honey ChipotleBoneless$8.49~320 calSweet & smoky, no bones

Papa Johns Sides Menu — Perfect Pairings for Your Pizza

Papa Johns offers a well-rounded sides menu that goes beyond just breadsticks. Here's every side available and what to expect. For a full calorie breakdown see our Papa Johns nutrition guide:

Side Item Price Cal (serving) Description
Garlic Knots$6.00~310 cal/4pcFresh-baked, garlic Parmesan seasoning — the #1 side item
Breadsticks$8.29~290 cal/2pcClassic garlic-buttered breadsticks, great for dipping
Cheesesticks$8.29~340 cal/2pcFreshly baked with real mozzarella and garlic butter
Jalapeño Bacon Cheesesticks$8.29~360 cal/2pcCheesesticks upgraded with jalapeños and crispy bacon
Papa Bowls$8.29~520 cal/bowlCrustless pizza in a bowl — great for low-carb & keto eaters

Papa Johns Dessert Menu — Sweet Endings

Save room for dessert! The Papa Johns dessert menu is simple but satisfying. Whether you want something chocolatey, cinnamony, or playfully sweet, there's a dessert for every craving:

Dessert Price Calories Description
Double Chocolate Chip Brownie$8.49~430 calWarm, fudgy brownie loaded with chocolate chips — best seller
Cinnamon Pull-Aparts$7.49~420 calBite-sized cinnamon rolls, dusted with sugar, cream cheese drizzle
OREO Cookie Papa Bites$6.99~85 cal/rollPull-apart sweet rolls with OREO pieces and icing. 8 rolls.

💡 Best Deal: Order Papa Bites (OREO) — 8 individual sweet rolls at $6.99 is better value than any single dessert if sharing with a group. Use a Papa Johns promo code to save even more!

Papa Johns Dipping Sauces — Enhance Every Bite

Every Papa Johns order comes with one free Special Garlic Sauce. Additional sauces are available for $0.75 each. Here are all the options:

  • Special Garlic Sauce — ~150 cal | Buttery, garlicky — the iconic Papa Johns dipping sauce. Free with every order.
  • Pizza Sauce — ~25 cal | The classic tomato base. Great for dipping breadsticks.
  • Blue Cheese — ~170 cal | Creamy, tangy. Best with Buffalo wings.
  • Ranch — ~140 cal | Crowd-pleasing, works with everything.
  • BBQ Sauce — ~50 cal | Smoky-sweet. Perfect with chicken wings or Papa Bites.
  • Honey Mustard — ~130 cal | Sweet-tangy. Great with boneless wings.
  • Garlic Parmesan — ~160 cal | Rich and savory. Pairs with cheesesticks or crust.

Papa Johns Drinks Menu

Papa Johns keeps the drinks menu simple — Coca-Cola products in 20oz bottles or 2-liter options:

  • Coca-Cola — $2.29 (20oz) / $3.99 (2-liter)
  • Diet Coke — $2.29 (20oz) / $3.99 (2-liter)
  • Dr Pepper — $2.29 (20oz) / $3.99 (2-liter)
  • Mug Root Beer — $2.29 (20oz)
  • Crush Orange — $2.29 (20oz)

💡 Tip: Order the 2-liter for group orders — it's much better value per serving than individual bottles.

Best Papa Johns Deals & Specials in 2026

Papa Johns is known for offering some of the best pizza deals in the business. Here are the top offers to look for right now. Bookmark our Papa Johns coupons page — we update it weekly with the latest codes:

Papa Pairings — Most Popular Deal:

Mix and match any two or more medium 1-topping pizzas, wings, Papadias, breadsticks, cheesesticks, or desserts for just $6.99 each. This is the best value deal on the entire menu, especially for families or group orders.

Game Day Deal:

Get an XL New York Style pizza with one topping for just $11.99 — perfect for watching sports with friends.

Papa Rewards Program:

  • Earn 1 point per $5 spent on every order
  • Redeem points for free pizzas, sides, and discounts
  • Birthday reward — free item on your birthday when you sign up
  • Sign up free at papajohns.com/papa-rewards or view our Papa Rewards guide

Promo Codes (Check Before Every Order):

  • 25% off sitewide — codes updated monthly on our Papa Johns promo codes page
  • Buy one get one free — available during special events and holidays
  • $10 off $20+ orders — available via email list and app notifications

📌 Pro Tip: Always check for a promo code before completing your order. Papa Johns offers sitewide discounts almost every week — you can save 25-50% regularly.

Final Thoughts — The Complete Papa Johns Menu Has Something for Everyone

Whether you're a die-hard pepperoni fan, a wing lover, a vegetarian, or someone who just wants the most cheese possible — the Papa Johns menu in 2026 truly has something for everyone. With six crust options, over a dozen specialty pizzas, new Papa Bites, satisfying Papadias, and some of the best fast-food deals around, Papa Johns continues to deliver on its 'Better Ingredients. Better Pizza.' promise.

Before placing your next order, always check for a current promo code — you can often save 25-50% on your entire order. And if you want to order smart and stay on track health-wise, be sure to check our full Papa Johns nutrition guide.

👉 Order from the Papa Johns menu now: papajohns.com
author: Papa John's Editorial Team
imageAlt: Papa Johns menu prices guide with pizza and sides

faqs.question: What's on the Papa Johns menu in 2026?
faqs.answer: The Papa Johns menu in 2026 includes a wide range of items: pizzas (classic and specialty), Papadias (flatbread sandwiches), Papa Bites (savory and sweet pull-apart rolls), chicken wings (bone-in and boneless in 7 flavors), sides (garlic knots, breadsticks, cheesesticks, Papa Bowls), desserts (brownie, cinnamon pull-aparts, OREO Papa Bites), dipping sauces, and drinks. They also offer 6 crust options including gluten-free and NY Style.

faqs.question: How much does Papa Johns pizza cost in 2026?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns pizza prices in 2026 start at $10.99 for a small pizza. Medium pizzas range from $12.99 to $15.78, large pizzas from $14.99 to $18.99, and XL pizzas from $16.99 to $22.99. Specialty and handcrafted pizzas (like The Works, Shaq-a-Roni, or Philly Cheesesteak) are priced at $18.99 for a large. Prices may vary slightly by location.

faqs.question: What are the most popular items on the Papa Johns menu?
faqs.answer: According to Papa Johns, the most popular menu items are: Pepperoni Pizza (their all-time best seller), The Works Pizza, Garlic Knots (most popular side), Double Chocolate Chip Brownie (top dessert), and Buffalo Wings. The Shaq-a-Roni Pizza and Philly Cheesesteak Papadia have also become customer favorites since their launch.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have a gluten-free menu option?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa Johns offers a Gluten-Free Crust. However, it is important to note that this crust is baked in shared facilities alongside wheat-containing products, making it unsuitable for customers with celiac disease. People with non-celiac gluten sensitivity may be able to tolerate it. The gluten-free crust also contains milk, egg, and soy — check with your store if you have additional allergies.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest item on the Papa Johns menu?
faqs.answer: The cheapest items on the Papa Johns menu are the dipping sauces at $0.75 each. For a full meal, small pizzas start at $10.99, garlic knots are $6.00, and Papa Bites start at $6.99. The best budget deal is the Papa Pairings offer — two medium 1-topping pizzas (or mix of items) for just $6.99 each when you order two or more qualifying items.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have a menu for vegetarians?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa Johns has several vegetarian-friendly options. The Garden Fresh Pizza features mushrooms, onions, green peppers, black olives, and tomatoes. The Spinach & Tomato Alfredo Pizza is another popular veggie option. You can also create your own pizza with vegetable toppings only. Additionally, the sides (garlic knots, breadsticks, cheesesticks) and most dipping sauces are vegetarian-friendly.

faqs.question: What are Papa Johns hours and how do I order?
faqs.answer: Most Papa Johns locations are open Monday through Sunday from 10:00 AM to 1:00 AM (hours may vary by location). You can order online at papajohns.com, through the Papa Johns mobile app (iOS and Android), or by calling your nearest location. Online ordering gives you access to the best deals and exclusive app-only promotions. Use the store locator at locations.papajohns.com to find your nearest Papa Johns.

title: Pizza Delivery Near You: How to Get Hot Pizza Fast in 2026 (Complete Guide)
excerpt: Stop searching 'pizza near me' and discover why Papa John's is your top choice for fresh, hot, and speedy pizza delivery.
content:
Whether it's a lazy Friday night, a big game day, a birthday party, or you simply can't face cooking — pizza delivery near you is always just a few taps away. And in 2026, it has never been easier, faster, or more affordable to get a piping-hot pizza delivered straight to your door.

Last Updated: March 2026

But with so many pizza chains, delivery apps, and options available, how do you find the best pizza near you? How long will it take? Where are the best deals? And how do you make sure your pizza arrives hot and fresh every single time?

In this complete guide, we cover everything — from the top pizza delivery chains and how to find them, to insider tips, the best cheap deals, free delivery hacks, and exactly what to do for the fastest, most satisfying pizza delivery experience in 2026. Let's get that pizza ordered. 🍕

Why Pizza Delivery Is More Popular Than Ever in 2026

Pizza delivery is not just popular — it's a phenomenon. The search query 'pizza delivery near me' is one of the most searched food-related phrases in the entire world, with over 5 million searches every single month in the United States alone. That number has grown by a staggering 900% over the past five years, driven by the rise of online ordering, food delivery apps, and a permanent shift in how Americans eat at home.

The numbers tell the full story. According to the USDA, approximately 1 in 8 Americans eats pizza on any given day. About 59% of all pizza consumed in the U.S. is eaten at home — much of that delivered. And in 2026, 64% of consumers say they prefer placing pizza orders digitally. Why is pizza the king of delivery food? A few reasons stand out:

  • Universal appeal — pizza satisfies picky eaters, vegetarians, meat lovers, and adventurous foodies all at once
  • Easy customization — build the exact pizza you want with any toppings, crust, and sauce
  • Value for money — one pizza can feed a family for under $15–20
  • Fast delivery — average delivery time in 2026 is just 30 minutes and 32 seconds
  • Consistent quality — major chains maintain the same taste across thousands of locations

The pizza industry in 2026 is also evolving rapidly. Digital ordering, AI-powered phone support, and in-house delivery apps are replacing third-party platforms — and that means better prices and faster service for customers. Check the complete Papa Johns menu guide to see everything available for delivery right now.

Best Pizza Delivery Chains Near You in 2026

When it comes to pizza delivery near you, a handful of major chains dominate the landscape. Here's how the top three stack up in 2026, so you can choose the right one for your order. You can also find your nearest Papa Johns location instantly:

Feature Papa Johns ❤️ Domino's Pizza Hut
Avg Delivery Time~30 minutes ✅~28 minutes~35 minutes
Starting Price$10.99 (small)$7.99 (carryout)$10.99 (personal)
Ingredient QualityFresh, no MSG ✅StandardStandard
Crust Options6 crusts ✅5 crusts4 crusts
App ExperienceEasy + deals ✅Excellent ✅Good
Loyalty ProgramPapa Rewards ✅Domino's RewardsHut Rewards
Free Garlic SauceYes — always ✅NoNo
Order Accuracy97% ✅95%94%
Best ForQuality + valueSpeed + dealsVariety

💡 Our Pick: Papa Johns wins on ingredient quality, order accuracy (97%), free garlic sauce with every order, and the Papa Rewards loyalty program. For the best pizza delivery near you, Papa Johns is our top recommendation.

How to Find Pizza Delivery Near You — 4 Easy Methods

Method 1: Direct Chain Website or App (Best Option)

The best way to find pizza delivery near you is to go directly to the pizza chain's website or app. Just enter your delivery address, and the site instantly shows you whether your location is covered. This method typically offers the lowest prices and the best deals because there are no third-party fees added to your order.

  • Papa Johns: papajohns.com or Papa Johns app — enter address to see nearest location instantly
  • Domino's: dominos.com — their store locator is one of the fastest in the industry
  • Pizza Hut: pizzahut.com — shows all nearby locations with current hours

Method 2: Google Search (Fastest Discovery)

Type 'pizza delivery near me' directly into Google. Google will instantly show a map with the top pizza delivery options in your area, complete with ratings, hours, and distance. Click on any listing to see the menu, hours, and a direct link to order. This is perfect when you haven't decided which chain you want yet.

Method 3: Food Delivery Apps

Apps like DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub aggregate all pizza restaurants in your area into one interface. While convenient, these apps typically charge a delivery fee ($2–$5) and service fee (5–15%) on top of menu prices. Use them when your preferred chain doesn't offer its own delivery, or when you want to browse many restaurant options at once.

Method 4: Google Maps

Open Google Maps and search 'pizza delivery near me.' Google Maps shows you every pizza restaurant nearby with real-time hours, phone numbers, ratings, and photos. Many major chains also have 'Order Online' buttons built directly into their Google Maps listing. Or use our Papa Johns store locator to find the closest branch instantly.

How to Order Pizza for Delivery — Step-by-Step Guide

Ready to order? Here's the exact process to get the best pizza delivery experience every time. Make sure to check the full Papa Johns menu with prices before you start:

  • Go to papajohns.com or open the Papa Johns app (iOS or Android)
  • Enter your delivery address — the site automatically finds your nearest location
  • Browse the menu — choose your pizza, crust type, and toppings
  • Add sides, wings, or desserts to your order if desired
  • Before checking out — apply any available promo code or coupon (can save 25–50%!)
  • Select your payment method — credit card, PayPal, or cash on delivery (varies by location)
  • Choose contactless delivery if preferred — driver leaves pizza at your door
  • Submit your order and use the Papa Johns order tracker to follow your pizza in real time
  • When pizza arrives, check your order before the driver leaves
  • Tip your driver — 15–20% is standard for good service

💡 Pro Tip: Always check our Papa Johns coupons page before placing your order. Papa Johns offers sitewide discounts of 25–50% almost every week — leaving money on the table is avoidable!

How Long Does Pizza Delivery Take in 2026?

According to the 2026 Pizza DELCO Industry Report, the average pizza delivery time from major chains is 30 minutes and 32 seconds. That's the industry benchmark for customer satisfaction — anything under 35 minutes is considered a great delivery experience. Check Papa Johns store hours to confirm your location is open before ordering:

Scenario Expected Time Satisfaction Notes
Papa Johns (in-house delivery)25–35 min ✅High ✅Fastest option — direct ordering
Domino's (in-house delivery)20–30 min ✅High ✅Consistently the fastest chain
Via DoorDash / Uber Eats35–55 minMedium2 min 38 sec slower than direct
Late night (after 10pm)40–60 minMediumFewer drivers available
Game Day / Weekend45–75 minLowerHigh demand — order early!

How to Get Your Pizza Faster:

  • Order directly from the chain's website or app — in-house delivery is 2.5 minutes faster than third-party apps
  • Order during off-peak hours (2–5pm on weekdays) — kitchens are less busy
  • Choose carryout — it's always faster than delivery if you live within 5 minutes of a store
  • Keep your address and payment saved in the app — it speeds up checkout dramatically
  • Avoid ordering during the Super Bowl, major sporting events, and Friday nights — these are peak demand windows

Cheap Pizza Delivery Near You — Best Deals in 2026

Pizza delivery doesn't have to break the bank. Here are the best ways to get cheap pizza delivery near you in 2026. Bookmark our Papa Johns promo codes page — updated weekly:

Chain Deal How to Get It
Papa JohnsPapa Pairings — $6.99 eachMix any 2+ medium pizzas, sides, or wings for $6.99 per item — best value deal
Papa Johns25–50% off sitewideVisit our coupons page — updated weekly with sitewide promo codes
Papa JohnsPapa Rewards pointsEarn 1 pt per $5 spent. Redeem for free pizza. Sign up free via Papa Rewards
Domino'sMix & Match $6.99 eachOrder 2+ mix-and-match items for $6.99 each
Pizza Hut$10 Tastemaker dealLarge 3-topping pizza for $10 — available online only

How to Get FREE Pizza Delivery:

  • Papa Johns app — regularly offers free delivery promo codes via push notifications
  • Papa Rewards program — redeem accumulated points for free items including delivery waivers
  • Email signup — subscribe to Papa Johns emails for exclusive free delivery offers
  • Domino's Rewards — earn free pizza after 6 orders, no minimum spend required
  • Uber One membership ($9.99/month) — $0 delivery fees on Uber Eats orders over minimum
  • DashPass ($9.99/month) — free delivery on DoorDash orders from eligible restaurants

💡 Best Free Delivery Hack: Join Papa Rewards (free) and use their app. Papa Johns regularly pushes free delivery codes exclusively to app users. Order 6 times and you'll have earned enough points for a free pizza on top of that.

Pizza Open for Delivery Right Now Near You

Craving pizza at midnight? You're not alone. Late-night pizza delivery near you is available from most major chains. Here's what you need to know about pizza delivery hours in 2026. You can also check Papa Johns hours for your specific location:

Standard Pizza Delivery Hours (Most Locations):

  • Papa Johns — 10:00 AM to 1:00 AM (Monday–Sunday), some locations until 2:00 AM on weekends
  • Domino's — 10:00 AM to 1:00 AM daily, some locations open until 3:00 AM
  • Pizza Hut — 11:00 AM to 11:00 PM daily, limited late-night locations

How to Check If a Pizza Place Is Open Right Now:

  • Visit papajohns.com and enter your address — it shows real-time store hours automatically
  • Search 'pizza delivery near me open now' on Google — Google shows live hours with green 'Open' indicators
  • Use our Papa Johns store locator — find your nearest branch with live hours
  • Check the Papa Johns app — it only shows available delivery windows for your current time

⚠️ Important: Hours listed online may vary by location. Always check the specific store's hours before placing a late-night order to avoid disappointment.

Pizza Delivery vs Pickup — Which Is Better?

Pizza delivery is convenient, but is it always the right choice? Here's an honest comparison to help you decide:

Factor Delivery Pickup / Carryout
Speed25–45 minutes15–20 minutes ✅ Faster
CostMenu price + delivery fee ($2–$5)Menu price only ✅ Cheaper
FreshnessSlightly cooler on arrivalPizza straight from oven ✅
ConvenienceNo travel needed ✅Must drive to store
Deals AvailableGood — many delivery promosExtra discounts often ✅
Best ForRainy days, large parties, lazy nightsBudget-conscious, fastest freshness

💡 Papa Johns Carryout Tip: Papa Johns frequently offers exclusive carryout discounts of 25–30% — meaning you save on both the delivery fee AND the pizza price. Use a Papa Johns promo code to stack even more savings. If you live within 5 minutes of a Papa Johns, carryout is almost always the better deal. Use our store locator to find your nearest branch.

Best Pizza Styles for Delivery (and Which to Avoid)

Not all pizza travels equally. The style of pizza you choose dramatically affects how good it will taste when it arrives at your door. See the full Papa Johns crust guide for all 6 options:

Best Pizza Styles for Delivery:

  • New York Style — the gold standard for delivery. Sturdy, large, foldable slices that hold up perfectly in the box. Papa Johns NY Style Crust is an excellent option.
  • Thin Crust — lightweight and crispy, it stays relatively fresh during delivery. Papa Johns Thin Crust remains one of the best delivery choices.
  • Hand Tossed / Original Crust — the classic delivery pizza. Thick enough to stay warm but not so thick it gets soggy.

Pizza Styles to Avoid for Delivery:

  • Neapolitan — paper-thin, wet crust becomes soggy very quickly in a delivery box. Best eaten fresh out of the oven at the restaurant.
  • Deep Dish / Chicago Style — takes up to an hour to bake and arrives too hot or already starting to cool. Better for carryout.
  • Sicilian / Thick Crust — heavy, dense, and can become gummy during the drive. Best picked up in person.

💡 Pro Tip: For delivery, always go with Papa Johns Original Hand Tossed, Thin Crust, or NY Style. These three crusts are specifically designed to maintain quality during transit. Check the full Papa Johns menu for exact prices and calorie info on each crust.

10 Pro Tips for the Best Pizza Delivery Experience

After ordering hundreds of pizzas, here are the insider tips that make every delivery order better:

  • Always check for a coupon code before ordering — you can save 25–50% every single time.
  • Join Papa Rewards (free) — earn points on every order and redeem for free pizza. It takes just 2 minutes to sign up.
  • Save your address and payment info in the app — checkout takes under 60 seconds next time.
  • Order contactless delivery — select this option at checkout so the driver leaves your pizza at the door with a photo confirmation.
  • Track your order in real time — use the Papa Johns PapaTrack feature to follow your pizza from oven to door.
  • During peak times (Friday nights, Super Bowl, weekends), order 30–45 minutes earlier than you think you need to.
  • Request the pizza is NOT pre-cut — an unsliced pizza stays hotter and retains its shape better during delivery.
  • Tip your driver well — $3–$5 minimum, or 15–20% of your order total. Good tippers consistently get faster, friendlier service.
  • Open the box immediately when it arrives — letting a pizza sit in a closed box for even 5 minutes creates steam and makes the crust soggy.
  • Keep the garlic dipping sauce — Papa Johns includes it free with every order. If you don't use it for dipping, it makes an incredible spread on leftover pizza.

Final Thoughts — Pizza Delivery Near You Has Never Been Better

In 2026, finding the best pizza delivery near you is easier, faster, and more affordable than ever before. With major chains like Papa Johns offering 25–35 minute delivery times, Papa Pairings deals starting at $6.99, free garlic sauce with every order, and a loyalty program that rewards every purchase — there has never been a better time to order pizza to your door.

Before your next order, take 30 seconds to check for a promo code and join Papa Rewards if you haven't already. These two habits alone can save you hundreds of dollars per year on pizza delivery.

👉 Order pizza delivery now: papajohns.com

faqs.question: How do I find pizza delivery near me right now?
faqs.answer: The fastest way to find pizza delivery near you is to visit papajohns.com or open the Papa Johns app and enter your delivery address. The system instantly shows your nearest location, current hours, and the full menu with real-time pricing. Alternatively, search 'pizza delivery near me' on Google for a map of all nearby options with live hours, ratings, and direct ordering links.

faqs.question: How long does pizza delivery take near me?
faqs.answer: Based on 2026 industry data, the average pizza delivery time from major chains is approximately 30 minutes and 32 seconds. Papa Johns delivers in 25–35 minutes on average for standard orders. Delivery times can be longer during peak hours (Friday evenings, game days, weekends) and shorter during off-peak times (weekday afternoons). Ordering directly from the chain's website or app is typically 2–3 minutes faster than ordering through third-party delivery apps.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest pizza delivery near me?
faqs.answer: The best cheap pizza delivery deals in 2026 come from Papa Johns' Papa Pairings offer — mix and match any two qualifying medium pizzas, sides, or wings for just $6.99 each. You can also use sitewide promo codes at papajohns.com/coupons to save 25–50% on your entire order. For the absolute cheapest option, consider carryout — it eliminates the delivery fee and sometimes comes with an additional discount.

faqs.question: Is there pizza delivery open near me right now?
faqs.answer: Yes, most Papa Johns locations are open for delivery from 10:00 AM until 1:00 AM daily, with some locations staying open until 2:00 AM on weekends. To check real-time availability, visit papajohns.com, enter your delivery address, and the system will show whether delivery is currently available at your location. You can also search 'pizza open near me now' on Google for a live map with hours.

faqs.question: What pizza delivery has free delivery near me?
faqs.answer: Several ways to get free pizza delivery near you in 2026: Join Papa Rewards (free) and use the Papa Johns app — Papa Johns regularly offers free delivery codes to app users and loyalty members. You can also check papajohns.com/coupons for current free delivery promo codes. For regular delivery orders, consider subscribing to Uber One or DashPass for flat-fee monthly delivery benefits across multiple restaurants.

faqs.question: What is the best pizza delivery near me?
faqs.answer: Based on overall quality, ingredient freshness, order accuracy, delivery speed, and value — Papa Johns consistently ranks as one of the top pizza delivery choices in 2026. Their commitment to 'Better Ingredients. Better Pizza.' means no MSG, fresh dough, 100% real mozzarella, and vine-ripened tomato sauce. They also have a 97% order accuracy rate, offer free garlic sauce with every order, and have one of the best loyalty programs in the pizza industry.

faqs.question: How do I track my pizza delivery?
faqs.answer: Papa Johns offers their PapaTrack real-time order tracking system. After placing your order, you'll receive a tracking link via text or email, or you can track directly in the Papa Johns app. The tracker shows your pizza's progress through preparation, quality check, and delivery stages. Most other major chains also offer order tracking — Domino's has their Domino's Tracker, and Pizza Hut has their Hut Status tracker.

faqs.question: Is it better to order pizza delivery or pickup?
faqs.answer: It depends on your priorities. Pickup (carryout) is faster (15–20 minutes vs 30–45 minutes), cheaper (no delivery fee), and the pizza is hotter and fresher. Delivery is more convenient — especially in bad weather, for large parties, or when you simply don't want to leave the house. Papa Johns offers carryout discounts that can save you an additional 25%, making carryout an excellent value option when you're close to a store.

title: Introducing Secret Papadias Flavors for 2026
excerpt: Our famous flatbread sandwiches just got a massive upgrade. Explore the mouth-watering Papadias flavors launching this year.
content:
The part-sandwich, part-pizza masterpiece is back. The flatbread sandwich revolution continues with highly-requested new culinary variations. This year, we're introducing the legendary Spicy Italian Crunch Papadia and the all-new BBQ Chicken Mac & Cheese variant.

Why Order a Papadia?

We've combined our signature hand-tossed dough with premium fillings that burst with flavor in every bite. Perfectly toasted and paired with our iconic dipping sauces from our Sides & Dips guide, these are not just simple sandwiches—they are portable pizza experiences made for satisfying solo lunches or late-night gaming sessions.
author: Secret Menu Experts
imageAlt: New Papadias flavors 2026 with cheesy stuffed sandwiches

faqs.question: What exactly is a Papadia?
faqs.answer: It is a toasted flatbread sandwich made from our original signature pizza dough, folded and filled with delicious meats and melted cheeses.

faqs.question: Are the 2026 flavors permanent?
faqs.answer: The BBQ Chicken Mac & Cheese is a limited-time 2026 release, while the Spicy Italian Crunch is here to stay!

faqs.question: Can I swap the dipping sauces?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every Papadia comes with a sauce, but you can swap it for any favorite in our Sauces & Dips section.

faqs.question: Is the Spicy Italian crunch very hot?
faqs.answer: The Spicy Italian Crunch has a mild kick. If you want it completely mild, ask to skip the jalapeños during ordering.

title: Classic Pizzas: The Papa John's Standard
excerpt: Discover the timeless classics crafted from our famous fresh dough, signature pizza sauce, and 100% real mozzarella cheese.
content:
Our Classic Pizzas are the undisputed heart and soul of Papa John's. Making great pizza starts with better ingredients, such as our fresh, never-frozen original dough and sauce made from vine-ripened tomatoes. Historical pizza standards demand high quality, and we strictly enforce it.

The Legends Never Die

Whether you load up on the iconic Pepperoni or share the ever-popular John's Favorite with the family, these classic pies guarantee unmatched comfort. If you're hosting a party, always order our extra-large classics. Looking for something heavier? Check out our Super Loaded menu to go beyond tradition!
author: Papa John's Kitchen
imageAlt: Papa Johns Classic Pizzas with fresh dough and real mozzarella

faqs.question: What is included in the Classic Cheese?
faqs.answer: Our classic cheese features massive amounts of 100% real mozzarella on our signature tomato-base sauce.

faqs.question: Can I choose thin crust on classic pizzas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You can switch any classic pizza to our crispy Thin Crust or flavorful Epic Stuffed Crust via the menu order page.

faqs.question: Is John's Favorite a classic?
faqs.answer: Yes! Packed with pepperoni, sausage, and a custom six-cheese blend, it has remained a fan-favorite classic for decades.

faqs.question: Can I order a half-and-half pizza?
faqs.answer: Yes, our online ordering system supports split pizzas so you can get half Cheese and half Pepperoni!

faqs.question: What is Papa's unique garlic dipping sauce?
faqs.answer: Every classic pizza includes an order of our iconic Special Garlic Dipping Sauce and a peperoncini.

title: Super Loaded Pizzas
excerpt: Packed end-to-end with premium meats and fresh-cut vegetables. Because sometimes, more really is more.
content:
For those who absolutely believe that more is better, our Super Loaded Specialty pizzas deliver a massive feast! We pile heavy layers of premium meats, fresh-cut vegetables, and extra cheese high to create an epic flavor profile. It's almost the exact opposite of minimalism.

Curb Your Cravings

Our top contender in this category is 'The Works' - a masterpiece combining sausage, pepperoni, onions, green peppers, and mushrooms. For pure meat lovers, 'The Meats' is entirely unbeatable. To explore exact pricing or to start an order, visit our online menu right now!
author: Papa John's Kitchen
imageAlt: Papa Johns Super Loaded Pizzas with extra meats and fresh veggies

faqs.question: What is on 'The Works'?
faqs.answer: Pepperoni, julienne-cut Canadian bacon, spicy Italian sausage, fresh-cut onions, crisp green peppers, and mushrooms.

faqs.question: Are Super Loaded pizzas heavier?
faqs.answer: Yes, due to the massive weight of the ingredients, these pizzas provide significantly more volume and value per slice compared to classic pizzas.

faqs.question: Can I remove one ingredient from 'The Works'?
faqs.answer: Definitely! You can customize any loaded specialty pizza and strip away ingredients using our builder tool.

faqs.question: Do they cost more than classical pizzas?
faqs.answer: Loaded pizzas generally run higher than Classic pizzas because of the extreme topping ratios and complex flavor blends.

faqs.question: What is the Epic Stuffed Crust?
faqs.answer: The Epic Stuffed Crust takes any specialty pizza to the next level by baking warm, gooey mozzarella cheese directly into the outer crust.

pricing.item: Extra Large (16") The Works / The Meats

title: Delicious Sides & Dips
excerpt: The perfect companions to your pizza. Indulge in warm Breadsticks, stuffed Papa Bites, and signature dipping sauces.
content:
No Papa John's order is complete without the perfect side. Our legendary Garlic Parmesan Breadsticks, sweet Double Chocolate Chip Brownies, and spicy Buffalo Wings are carefully crafted to elevate your pizza experience. Some food historians study garlic bread, but we just want to eat it!

The Magic of Dips

Don't forget to bundle your sides with our iconic Special Garlic dipping sauce. Pairing our breadsticks with the right dip changes everything. Be sure to browse the Sauces & Dips page before completing your checkout.
author: Papa John's Kitchen
imageAlt: Papa Johns Delicious Sides and Dips including Garlic Breadsticks and Papa Bites

faqs.question: Do the wings come boneless?
faqs.answer: Yes! Papa John's offers both traditional bone-in wings and premium all-white meat boneless wings.

faqs.question: What is an Oreo Cookie Papa Bite?
faqs.answer: It is our legendary dough wrapped around a sweet, creamy Oreo filling and baked to a golden perfection.

faqs.question: Can I buy the Garlic Sauce in bulk?
faqs.answer: You can add as many Special Garlic Sauce cups as you like to your order via the Dips section.

faqs.question: Are the breadsticks vegan?
faqs.answer: Our original breadsticks are naturally vegan! However, the Garlic Parmesan variant contains dairy.

faqs.question: Are Cheesesticks different from Breadsticks?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Cheesesticks are essentially a pizza crust covered in our signature garlic sauce and a massive layer of 100% real mozzarella cheese.

title: Papa Johns Nutrition Guide: Full Calories & Allergens (2026)
author: Papa John's Editorial Team
imageAlt: papa johns nutrition guide calories allergens 2026
excerpt: Looking for Papa Johns nutrition info? Get full calories, allergens & healthy items to order in 2026. Get the complete carbohydrate and protein guide now!
content:
Whether you're counting calories, managing food allergies, or just trying to make smarter choices without giving up great pizza — this complete papa johns nutrition guide has everything you need. Papa Johns is one of America's most popular pizza chains, and the good news is that they're also one of the most transparent when it comes to nutritional information. Last Updated: March 2026. If you're also looking for savings, don't forget to check out the latest Papa Johns deals before you order.

The Ultimate Papa Johns Nutrition Strategy

Pizza has a reputation for being unhealthy — but that reputation isn't entirely fair. The key is knowing what's in your food. Papa Johns makes this easy by providing detailed nutritional information on their website and app, covering calories, fat, carbohydrates, protein, and all major allergens. If you follow a strict diet, we recommend referring to the official nutrition document for real-time updates.

Macro-Nutrient Philosophy: Better Ingredients, Better Body

What makes Papa Johns stand out nutritionally? No MSG, fresh never-frozen dough, 100% real mozzarella cheese, and vine-ripened tomato sauce with no artificial flavors. This commitment to 'Better Ingredients' translates to a cleaner nutritional profile compared to many other national fast-food chains. Our dough consists of just six simple ingredients: unbleached enriched wheat flour, water, sugar, soybean oil, salt, and yeast. This simplicity is a hallmark of our papa johns nutrition philosophy.

Papa Johns Pizza Calories by Crust Type (Detailed Breakdown)

The single biggest factor affecting how many calories are in your Papa Johns pizza is the crust. Below you will find a full comparison of all crust types based on one slice of a large (14") pizza with cheese only. This table provides at-a-glance papa johns nutrition facts for every major crust variation available in 2026.

1. Original Hand-Tossed Crust (The Standard)

Our signature crust is the middle ground for nutrition. It's hearty and satisfying but comes with a higher carb count than the thin crust options. One slice of a large Original Crust Cheese Pizza typically contains 210 calories. If you're craving more toppings, see our Classic Pizzas guide.

2. Thin Crust (The Calorie-Saver)

If you're on a weight-loss journey, Thin Crust is your best friend. By switching from Original to Thin Crust, you automatically save about 50-70 calories per slice. It's crispy, lower in carbs, and allows the flavor of the toppings to shine through without the heavy bread base. Many health-conscious diners find that the Thin Crust allows them to eat more slices for the same total caloric load as a single slice of denser dough.

3. Epic Stuffed Crust (The Indulgent Choice)

While delicious, the Stuffed Crust is the highest calorie option. With mozzarella cheese baked directly into the outer edge, each slice adds approximately 60-80 calories compared to the hand-tossed version. We recommend this for 'cheat days' or sharing with friends. The sodium content in the Stuffed Crust is also significantly higher due to the extra cheese layer, which is a critical consideration for those on a low-sodium diet.

Papadias: The Sandwich-Pizza Nutritional Profile

The Papadia has become a staple of the papa johns nutrition conversation since its launch. It's essentially a folded pizza, which means it packs a significant caloric punch. Most Papadias range from 800 to 950 calories per serving. The Meatball Pepperoni variant is at the higher end, while the Grilled Buffalo Chicken is slightly lighter due to the leaner protein source.

To optimize your Papadia nutrition, we suggest sharing it with a friend or pairing half with a side salad. This allows you to enjoy the unique flavor without consuming nearly half of your daily recommended caloric intake in one sitting. The folded dough used in Papadias is similar to our Original Hand-Tossed recipe, providing a soft but substantial bite that is highly craveable but nutrient-dense.

Papa Johns Sides: Breadsticks, Knots, and Bites

Our sides are legendary, but they require a careful look at the nutrition facts. A single Garlic Parmesan Knot contains roughly 110 calories. The issue is that most people eat 3 to 5 in one sitting. For a lower-calorie alternative, our Original Breadsticks provide the same satisfyin crunch with slightly fewer fats than the buttered knots. If you're looking for the absolute lightest side, our un-sauced chicken wings are often the winner.

Wings Nutrition: Bone-In vs. Boneless

If you're looking for high protein, Papa Johns wings are an excellent addition. Our Bone-In wings are baked, not fried, which preserves the protein quality while keeping unnecessary fats lower. An 8-piece order of Buffalo Wings provides significant protein but watch out for the sodium content—over 2,000mg per box. Our boneless wings are breaded, which adds carbohydrates and roughly 10-15 calories per piece compared to bone-in variants. For many athletes, the bone-in baked wings are the gold standard for papa johns nutrition hacks.

Dessert Nutrition: Ending on a Sweet Note

Our papa johns nutrition guide wouldn't be complete without looking at the sweets. The Chocolate Chip Cookie (8-inch) is intended to serve eight people, with 190 calories per slice. The Double Chocolate Chip Brownie is even richer, at 210 calories per square. If you're watching your sugar intake, the Oreo® Cookie Papa Bites offer a smaller portion size, allowing for more control over your total dessert consumption.

Dessert Macro-Nutrient Overview

Most Papa Johns desserts are high in sugar and saturated fats. For example, a single slice of our Chocolate Chip Cookie contains roughly 9g of fat and 18g of sugar. We recommend these for communal sharing rather than individual consumption to keep your nutritional goals on track. The sugar content in the Double Chocolate Brownie is particularly high, which can cause significant blood glucose spikes if consumed on an empty stomach.

Dipping Sauces: The Hidden Calorie Trap

Many customers are surprised to learn that a single cup of our Special Garlic Sauce contains 150 calories—almost as much as a slice of thin-crust pizza! If you're looking to cut back, try the Pizza Dipping Sauce (only 20 calories) or enjoy your pizza without dipping. Our Honey Mustard and Blue Cheese cups also pack significant calories due to their oil-based emulsions. For a cleaner dip, stick to the Garlic Dipping Sauce sparingly or skip the cup entirely.

Beverage Choices and Liquid Calories

Don't let liquid calories sabotage your meal. A 20oz bottle of regular Pepsi contains 250 calories and 69g of sugar. Switching to Pepsi Zero Sugar or plain bottled water can save you a massive amount of empty calories, making your overall meal much more balanced from a nutritional standpoint. Always check the labels on 2-liter bottles as serving sizes can be deceptive when pouring at home. Proper hydration with water can also aid in the digestion of the high-carbohydrate pizza dough.

Papa Johns Allergen Guide 2026: What You Must Know

Papa Johns provides detailed allergen information for all of their menu items. The 9 major allergens tracked include Wheat (Gluten), Milk (Dairy), Eggs, Soy, Fish, Shellfish, Tree Nuts, Peanuts, and Sesame. Critical Note: The Pan Crust recipe updated in January 2026. It now contains dairy/milk. If you were previously ordering Pan Crust as a dairy-free option, please switch to the NY Style Crust or Thin Crust instead.

Managing Cross-Contamination

While we offer specialized crusts like our Gluten-Free variant, please be aware that all pizzas are prepared in a shared kitchen. This means cross-exposure to allergens like wheat, dairy, and soy is possible. If you have a severe, life-threatening allergy, we recommend exercising extreme caution and speaking directly with the store manager before placing your order to ensure the highest safety protocols are followed in the prep area.

Healthier Ordering Hacks (2026 Edition)

Want to enjoy Papa Johns more often? Follow these papa johns nutrition hacks to stay lean: 1. Order Thin Crust for everything. 2. Ask for 'Light Cheese' to save 100+ calories per pie. 3. Load up on water-dense vegetables like peppers and mushrooms. 4. Avoid dipping your crust in the butter sauce. 5. Stick to bone-in wings instead of boneless breaded bites. These simple changes can turn a 1,000 calorie meal into a much more manageable 600 calorie dinner.

Conclusion: Eating Smartly at Papa Johns

Knowing your papa johns nutrition information puts you in control. Whether you're managing allergies, following a specific diet like Keto or Paleo (where Thin Crust or Wings are your best bets), or simply trying to be more mindful of your daily intake, the customization options available at Papa Johns allow you to order smartly every single time. By leveraging the data in this guide, you can enjoy 'Better Ingredients, Better Pizza' while maintaining your health and wellness standards. Always verify latest data at papajohns.com/nutrition.

faqs.question: How many calories are in a slice of Papa Johns pizza?
faqs.answer: A slice of Papa Johns pizza typically ranges from 180 calories (thin crust cheese) to 320+ calories (Epic Stuffed Crust with meat toppings). For a standard medium Original Crust pepperoni pizza, one slice contains approximately 230 calories.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have a gluten-free pizza option?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa Johns offers a Gluten-Free Crust. However, it is baked in shared ovens, so it is NOT safe for customers with celiac disease. Use our locator to find stores offering this crust.

faqs.question: Is Papa Johns pizza good for weight loss?
faqs.answer: Yes, when ordered strategically. Choose thin crust, load up on vegetable toppings, skip the dipping sauces, and stick to 2 slices per meal.

faqs.question: What are the vegan options at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: You can custom-order a vegan pizza by choosing thin crust or original crust (both dairy-free), original tomato sauce, and requested no cheese.

faqs.question: Does Papa Johns have dairy-free options?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Original Hand Tossed, Thin Crust, and NY Style Crust are all dairy-free. Important: The Pan Crust now contains dairy as of 2026.

faqs.question: What is the healthiest pizza at Papa Johns?
faqs.answer: The healthiest option is a thin crust cheese pizza or Garden Fresh pizza, coming in at approximately 180 calories per slice.

faqs.question: Where can I find official Papa Johns nutritional info?
faqs.answer: The official guide is available at papajohns.com/nutrition.
